etymology.description: Phonetic жЈҐ + semantic р ¬њ = variant form of жЁЉ(жЁЉ)
etymology.interpretation: The character жЈҐ serves as a variant of жЁЉ(жЁЉ) (fГЎn, "fence"), where it combines the phonetic element жЈҐ with a semantic element р ¬њ. The composition indicates its pronunciation related to жЁЉ, while not altering its semantic association.
